description: The user hovers the cursor over various cards on the Trello board while reviewing the 'Japan' travel itinerary.
frame_description: A Trello board titled 'Japan' with lists for 'Tokyo To Do', 'Sapporo To Do', and 'Niseko To Do' is visible.

description: The user navigates away from the Trello board, and the Google homepage begins to load.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the Trello board to a white loading screen and then to the Google homepage.

description: The user navigates from the Google search page to the Booking.com homepage.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the Google homepage to the Booking.com landing page.

description: A 'Genius' sign-in modal automatically appears over the Booking.com homepage.
page_title: Booking.com | Official site | The best hotels, flights, car rentals & accommodations
frame_description: A blue and white modal titled 'Genius' appears in the center of the screen, offering a sign-in option.

description: The user clicks the 'X' button in the top right corner of the Genius modal to dismiss it.
page_title: Booking.com | Official site | The best hotels, flights, car rentals & accommodations
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the close icon on the Genius modal.

description: The Genius modal disappears, revealing the full Booking.com search interface.
page_title: Booking.com | Official site | The best hotels, flights, car rentals & accommodations
frame_description: The modal is gone, and the main search form on the Booking.com homepage is visible.

description: The user clicks into the destination input field to change the search location.
page_title: Booking.com | Official site | The best hotels, flights, car rentals & accommodations
frame_description: The cursor clicks inside the destination search box which currently contains 'Cradle Mountain'.

description: The user selects the existing text 'Cradle Mountain' in the search box to prepare for typing a new destination.
page_title: Booking.com | Official site | The best hotels, flights, car rentals & accommodations
frame_description: The text 'Cradle Mountain' inside the input field is highlighted in blue.

description: The user types 'london' into the destination search field.
page_title: Booking.com | Official site | The best hotels, flights, car rentals & accommodations
frame_description: The characters 'l', 'o', 'n', 'd', 'o', 'n' appear in the destination input field.

description: An autocomplete dropdown menu appears with location suggestions as the user types.
page_title: Booking.com | Official site | The best hotels, flights, car rentals & accommodations
frame_description: A dropdown list of locations starting with 'Lon' appears below the search input.

description: The user selects 'London, Greater London, United Kingdom' from the autocomplete suggestions.
page_title: Booking.com | Official site | The best hotels, flights, car rentals & accommodations
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the first suggestion in the dropdown list.

description: The user clicks the 'Search' button to initiate the hotel search for London.
page_title: Booking.com | Official site | The best hotels, flights, car rentals & accommodations
frame_description: The cursor clicks the blue 'Search' button on the right side of the search bar.

description: The page navigates to the search results for London.
page_title: Booking.com | Official site | The best hotels, flights, car rentals & accommodations
frame_description: The screen transitions from the homepage to the search results page.

description: The search results page for London loads completely.
frame_description: The results page is fully rendered, showing various hotel listings in London.

description: The user scrolls down the list of search results to browse available hotels.
frame_description: The user scrolls through the first few hotel listings, including 'Deluxe Two-Bedroom Vauxhall Apartment'.

description: The user continues scrolling down the results page, looking at more property listings.
frame_description: The user scrolls past listings for 'Arriva Hotel' and 'The Franklin London'.

description: The user scrolls back up towards the top of the search results page.
frame_description: The page content moves downwards as the user scrolls back to the top of the list.

description: The browser window transitions to a task completion screen.
frame_description: The Booking.com page is replaced by a dark overlay with the text 'What are you thinking about doing next?'.
